description: Style Note remanika combines edgy style with flattering fits in all their creations, including this trendy top. With excellent styling and a well designed look, this simple top will get the temperatures soaring when paired with a pair of leggings and flat strappy slip ons. Product Details Black sleeveless tunic, has a round neckline with the sleeves forming straps at the back converging to form a V, crystal embellishments on either shoulder and flaring pin tucks from below the neckline Material and Care Blended Cotton Gentle machine wash Do not bleach and tumble dry low Use cold iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size S
